return f(a)end,function(v,h)local f=e(h)local A=function(A,j,R,F,a,N,B)return d(v,{A,j;R,F,a;N;B},h,f)end return A end,function(v,h)local f=e(h)local A=function()return d(v,{},h,f)end return A end,function()s=(-349586-(-349587))+s B[s]=380276+-380275 return s end,{},function(v,h)local f=e(h)local A=function(A,j,R,F)return d(v,{A;j,R;F},h,f)end return A end,-865058-(-865058),function(v,h)local f=e(h)local A=function(A,j,R,F,a)return d(v,{A;j;R,F;a},h,f)end return A end return(W(444550+12343007,{}))(f(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[h(850207-792978)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
